data.body:
Administrative Controls: injections of safety via policy where engineering control isn't feasible. "Keep out when equipment is running."

The Rules as Intended. Textual guidance. They contextualize the rules and create the intended boundaries for how they are supposed to be deployed.

3/ Thorpe stands for LITERALLY THE EXACT OPPOSITE. In that case, the (Biden) DOJ moved to vacate the conviction of Aaron Thorpe pursuant to Rule 48(a) after Thorpe had been convicted by a jury & had exhausted his appellate review.

The DC Circuit said NO, Rule 48(a) doesn't let you do that.

The LiteLLM incident wasn’t a model problem. It was a supply chain problem.

AI systems are not single services anymore. They’re stacks of dependencies, & every layer assumes trust by default.

That’s the real vulnerability.
